common.selectOrgInNavbar: Select an organization in the top bar menu.

register.heading: Create account
register.successRedirect: Your account was created successfully. Log in to continue.

activeOrg.title: Active organization
activeOrg.description: Determines which units and profiles you see in the app. You can change it at any time.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure how you want to receive system alerts.
notifications.emailHint: Receive critical alerts at your email address.

account.title: Account
account.changeEmailHint: Modify the email address linked to your account.

display.title: Display
display.themeHint: Switch between light and dark theme.

overview.title: Overview
overview.noTotems: There are no totems in this organization.
overview.noTotemsHint: Register a totem to see its readings together here.
overview.pickAUnit: Select at least one totem to compare.
overview.capReached: Up to {{max}} totems at a time
overview.capHint: Up to {{max}} totems at a time. Remove one to add another.
overview.partialError_one: Could not load history for {{count}} totem.
overview.partialError_other: Could not load history for {{count}} totems.

units.title: Units
units.selectOrgHint: Select an organization in the top bar menu to see units.
units.noUnits: No units registered in this organization.

profiles.title: Crop profiles
profiles.selectOrgHint: Select an organization in the top bar menu.

organizations.title: Manage organizations
organizations.noOrgs: You don't have any organizations yet.

organizationSettings.title: Organization settings
organizationSettings.adminOnly: Only organization admins can view this page.
organizationSettings.name: Name
organizationSettings.addMemberHint: You can only add users who already have a Totem account — ask the person to register first with the email you'll use here.
organizationSettings.memberRemoved: {{email}} no longer belongs to this organization.

newUnit.title: Register unit
newUnit.description: Registering the unit will generate an API Key that you'll need to load into the device's firmware.
newUnit.networkHint: Device network data (optional). Only used to generate the nvs_config.csv file ready to flash — it's not sent to the server.
newUnit.mqttHint: Local IP of your server (RPi/PC), port 1883

newOrganization.title: New organization
newOrganization.description: An organization groups the Totem units and crop profiles of a given project or installation.

profileDetail.deleteWarning: Deleting this profile doesn't affect units that already have readings recorded, but any unit with this profile as active will be left without an assigned profile.
profileDetail.confirmDelete: Are you sure? This can't be undone.

unitDetail.commandError: Error sending command. Check the connection.
unitDetail.offlineMessage: The device isn't sending data. Control isn't available.
unitDetail.supplyingMessage: Solution level is insufficient — the valve is open filling the tank. The pump will start on its own once the float rises.

eventsList.noEvents: No irrigation in the last 7 days.

telegramLink.title: Telegram
telegramLink.linkedMessage: You'll receive alerts from your organizations on Telegram.
telegramLink.unlinkedMessage: Link your account to receive alerts directly on Telegram.

provisioning.saveWarningTitle: Save this information — it won't be shown again
provisioning.saveWarningBody: Download or copy the configuration file before leaving this page.
provisioning.fileDescription: Contains the API Key and network data to flash the device. It's built in your browser — it's not sent to or stored on the server.
provisioning.mqttHint: Local IP of your server (RPi/PC), port 1883

unitSettings.name: Name
unitSettings.regenerateHint: If you lost the API Key or suspect it was leaked, you can regenerate it. The previous key stops working immediately — the device will disconnect until you reprovision it with the new one.
unitSettings.confirmRegenerate: Are you sure? This invalidates the current key.
unitSettings.deactivateHint: Deactivating immediately revokes the device's MQTT access. Reading, event, and alert history is preserved.
unitSettings.confirmDeactivate: Are you sure? This can't be undone from the dashboard.

firmware.title: Firmware
firmware.adminOnly: Only organization admins can manage firmware releases.
firmware.binaryHint: The version is read automatically from the binary — no need to type it.
firmware.supportedMethodsHint: Declare which methods from the catalog this build implements — it can't be inferred from the `.bin`. Assigning a profile with a method not checked here to a unit on this release will be blocked.
firmware.unitStatusInfoAria: How the update status is calculated
firmware.unitStatusInfoBody: An update is only marked as pending within the same version line (same major.minor). A line change — e.g. from 1.1.x to 1.2.x — brings different functionality and isn't offered as an automatic update; apply it from the release list below.
firmware.confirmUpdateMessage: v{{version}} will be applied only to {{unit}}.
firmware.noReleases: No firmware releases published in this organization.
firmware.scopeOrgWarning_one: This will be applied immediately to all active Totem units in the organization — {{count}} unit. This affects hardware in operation.
firmware.scopeOrgWarning_other: This will be applied immediately to all active Totem units in the organization — {{count}} units. This affects hardware in operation.
firmware.scopeUnitWarning: This will be applied only to the selected unit.
firmware.confirmApplyOrg: Yes, apply to the whole organization
firmware.confirmDeleteMessage: Delete v{{version}}? This can't be undone.
firmware.pendingCountWarning_one: {{count}} unit has this version as a pending update. Deleting it cancels that pending update (units that already installed it aren't affected).
firmware.pendingCountWarning_other: {{count}} units have this version as a pending update. Deleting it cancels that pending update (units that already installed it aren't affected).

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.hint: Records that the unit is being serviced: the server discards the readings, events and alerts it sends, and stops reporting it as down. It does not stop the unit — as long as it has power it keeps measuring and irrigating on its own.
maintenance.disconnectTitle: Disconnect the unit before servicing it
maintenance.disconnectBody: Maintenance turns nothing off: the firmware decides on its own and, as long as it has power, it will keep measuring and may start the pump at any moment.
maintenance.notePlaceholder: e.g. pump replacement and nozzle cleaning
maintenance.liveNotice: While it lasts, nothing it sends is stored: readings, events and alerts are discarded.
maintenance.endHint: Reconnect the unit before ending, to confirm it starts up correctly and its readings are stored again.
